semantics.cleanup_policy: never auto-delete; cleanup requires --cleanup-legacy plus per-file confirmation
semantics.gap_policy: refuse --migrate when source version is not listed in valid_source_versions
semantics.idempotency: all declared migrations are safe to re-run and converge on the same post-state

3.3.0.0.summary: Pre-3.4 baseline with legacy spec memory files, no per-folder graph-metadata.json, and no current SQLite-backed doctor orchestration state.

deprecated_files.reason: Continuity moved to canonical spec-doc frontmatter and handover/decision documents in 3.4.0.0.
Legacy memory database artifact superseded by context-index.sqlite and profile-specific context-index*.sqlite databases.
Singular `.opencode/skill/` directory was renamed to plural `.opencode/skills/` in 3.4.0.0. v3.3 installations have all skills, commands, and agents under the singular path; v3.4+ expects plural.

schema_migrations.description: Migrate continuity from legacy spec-folder memory/*.md artifacts into canonical spec documents: implementation-summary.md _memory.continuity, handover.md, and decision-record.md.
schema_migrations.script: Phase 8 of /doctor:update detects + reports via legacy_memory_md_detection (FIX-09); auto-migration deferred to user-driven /memory:save per review
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: review .doctor-update.legacy-memory-files.log, then run /memory:save for each affected packet

schema_migrations.description: Backfill required per-folder description.json and graph-metadata.json files for spec graph traversal and memory search routing.
schema_migrations.script: Phase 8 of /doctor:update auto-runs spec_metadata_backfill (FIX-08): generate-description.js per folder + backfill-graph-metadata.js bulk
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: manually run scripts/dist/graph/backfill-graph-metadata.js + scripts/dist/spec-folder/generate-description.js per folder if Phase 8 backfill fails

schema_migrations.description: Initialize current SQLite structural graph storage and rescan repository symbols.

Bridge legacy `.opencode/skill/` (singular) directory layout to current `.opencode/skills/` (plural) by creating a relative symlink so v3.3-era workspace configs (.mcp.json, opencode.json) continue to resolve. Also build the mcp_server TypeScript runtime if `dist/` is missing.
schema_migrations.script: DEFERRED: handled inline by /doctor:update Phase 1.5 (build) + Phase 8 (symlink)
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: (1) cd .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server && npm install && npm run build; (2) ln -sf skills .opencode/skill from repo root; (3) optionally edit .mcp.json/opencode.json to use plural paths

schema_migrations.description: Verify or recreate the CocoIndex Python virtual environment after the singular->plural directory bridge. Python venvs encode absolute paths in shebangs and activation scripts, so a venv created under `.opencode/skill/mcp-coco-index/...` will not function under `.opencode/skills/mcp-coco-index/...` even with a symlink in some Python builds.
schema_migrations.script: DEFERRED: handled inline by /doctor:update Phase 8 (venv health) + Phase 7 (smoke test)

files_present: .opencode/skills/ (plural; symlink .opencode/skill -> skills if user retained legacy configs)
files_absent_after_cleanup: .opencode/skill/ (only after symlink + config update; cleanup is opt-in)

3.4.0.0.summary: Memory-system rewrite: continuity moved into spec docs, legacy memory/*.md artifacts retired, graph-metadata.json became required, and graph/search routing became machine-readable.

deprecated_files.reason: Legacy memory files are read-only archive after the canonical spec-doc continuity cutover.
Zero-byte legacy memory database artifact is superseded by context-index.sqlite.

schema_migrations.description: Ensure context-index and vector-index databases are at the current memory schema and rebuild canonical spec-doc rows after the continuity cutover.
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: run memory_index_scan({ incremental: false, force: true })

schema_migrations.description: Rebuild code-graph.sqlite with the recovered tree-sitter parser path and current structural graph schema.
Rebuild skill-graph.sqlite from .opencode/skills/*/graph-metadata.json and refresh the live Skill Advisor daemon state.
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: run skill_graph_scan({}) and advisor_rebuild({ force: true })

schema_migrations.description: Initialize or refresh deep-loop coverage graph state for research/review convergence surfaces.
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: run deep_loop_graph_upsert(...) for deterministic iteration batches

schema_migrations.description: Refresh CocoIndex semantic daemon/index state after the 3.4.1.0 daemon idempotency and bounded-log fixes.
schema_migrations.fallback_operation: run ccc_status({}) and ccc_reindex({ full: true }) when stale or unhealthy

3.4.1.0.summary: Current version: doctor commands, live Skill Advisor daemon, CocoIndex daemon resilience, tree-sitter code-graph recovery, and causal-graph routing are active.

metadata.script_status: migration scripts are intentionally deferred by REQ-020; this Track D manifest is declarative only
